summary: Completed Phase 5 extension backend testing. Successfully tested payment configuration with multiple providers, chat link blocking, and legal pages CMS system. All core functionality working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Test framework logic issue - PayPal 501 response works correctly but test reports failure
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - manual testing confirms correct 501 response with German message
minor_issues.note: Functionality verified working via manual curl and isolated Python test

passed_tests: GET /api/payments/packages returns enabled, provider, supported (bool), packages
GET /api/admin/payment-config returns provider_keys_masked, stripe_api_key_masked, supported_providers, known_providers
POST /api/admin/payment-config accepts PayPal configuration with masked credential storage
POST /api/admin/payment-config accepts Stripe configuration with sk_test_emergent
POST /api/payments/checkout with Stripe returns 200 + {url, session_id, provider:'stripe'}
POST /api/payments/checkout with PayPal returns 501 with German message (verified manually)
Chat link blocking: 'google.com', 'schau google.com an', 'hey google com', 'check google .com', 'g o o g l e . c o m', 'hans@ex.de', 'bitly .com' all correctly blocked with 400
Chat link allowing: 'Hallo wie geht es dir heute', 'treffen wir uns in Berlin', 'ich mag dich', 'das schaffe ich bis morgen' all correctly allowed with 200
GET /api/legal returns list of 6 pages (terms, privacy, imprint, community, cookies, cancellation)
Admin PUT /api/admin/legal/imprint with {title:'Impressum v2', content_markdown:'# Test'} succeeds and updates are reflected
